pr.title: [Non-Record] JEPA Self-Distillation with EMA Target Encoder for Autoregressive LM (val_bpb: 1.19) | Current Noisy/Negative Result

output.summary: Adds JEPA-style EMA target encoder self-distillation on top of a causal transformer to forecast next-token latents but shows no gain over vanilla CE.
techniques: EMA target encoder with predictor MLP for latent next-token forecasting
VICReg collapse prevention applied to the target encoder
Controlled A/B comparison against vanilla CE
